mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_disease_prevention WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_disease_prevention WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_disease_prevention WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_disease_prevention WHERE deleted = 0
AND (case_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR hazard_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR affected_area LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR responsible_person LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND hazard_type = #{hazardType}
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_disease_prevention WHERE case_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_disease_prevention ( case_id, hazard_type, hazard_name, description, affected_area, affected_workers, risk_level, exposure_level, prevention_measure, responsible_person, responsible_dept, assessment_date, next_assessment, status, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{caseId}, #{hazardType}, #{hazardName}, #{description}, #{affectedArea}, #{affectedWorkers}, #{riskLevel}, #{exposureLevel}, #{preventionMeasure}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{responsibleDept}, #{assessmentDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextAssessment,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}, #{notes}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_disease_prevention SET hazard_type = #{hazardType}, hazard_name = #{hazardName}, description = #{description}, affected_area = #{affectedArea}, affected_workers = #{affectedWorkers}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, exposure_level = #{exposureLevel}, prevention_measure = #{preventionMeasure}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, responsible_dept = #{responsibleDept}, assessment_date = #{assessmentDate,jdbcType=DATE}, next_assessment = #{nextAssessment,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_disease_prevention SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
